cb_step_1.title: Select Pelvic Volume
cb_step_1.instruction: Choose the Pelvic Volume from the Input CT Volume dropdown.

cb_step_2.title: Segment Pelvis
cb_step_2.instruction: Click the Run Step 1 button to segment the pelvis.

cb_step_3.title: Segment Fractures
cb_step_3.instruction: Click the Run Step 2 button to segment fractures.

cb_step_4.title: Exclude Fragments
cb_step_4.instruction: Untick any fragments you want to exclude from planning.

cb_step_5.title: Generate Template
cb_step_5.instruction: Click the Run Step 3 button to generate the template.

cb_step_6.title: Register and Reduce
cb_step_6.instruction: Click the Run Step 4 button to register and reduce fragments.

cb_step_7.title: Adjust Fragment?
cb_step_7.instruction: Choose Yes to manually adjust a fragment, or No to skip.

cb_step_8.title: Select Fragment
cb_step_8.instruction: Choose the fragment to adjust from the Fragment dropdown.

cb_step_9.title: Adjust Fragment
cb_step_9.instruction: Adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment in the 3D view.

cb_step_10.title: Apply Adjustments
cb_step_10.instruction: Click the Apply adjustments button to confirm changes.

cb_step_11.title: Plan Screws
cb_step_11.instruction: Click the Run Step 5 button to plan screw trajectories.

cb_step_12.title: Edit Screws?
cb_step_12.instruction: Choose Yes to edit screw trajectories, or No to stop.

cb_step_13.title: Adjust Screw Trajectories
cb_step_13.instruction: Adjust the position and rotation of the screw trajectories in the 3D view.

cb_step_14.title: Regenerate Screws
cb_step_14.instruction: Click the Regenerate screws from edited lines button to update based on your edits.

cb_step_15.title: Disable Screw Editing
cb_step_15.instruction: Untick the Edit Screw trajectories checkbox to exit editing mode.

operation_descriptions: Perform pelvis segmentation on the input volume.
Perform fracture segmentation on the pelvis.
Generate a template model from the pelvis segmentation.
Register and reduce the fracture fragments to the template.
Select a fracture fragment to adjust from the fragment selector.
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment.
Apply the manual adjustment to the fragment.
Plan screw trajectories based on the reduced pelvis and fracture segments.
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the screw trajectories.
Regenerate the screw models from the edited line trajectories.
Deactivate the screw editing mode by unticking the checkbox.

ground_api_evidence_note: ground_api_evidence is pre-revision retrieval evidence; final_api_evidence reflects the current validated templates.
